## Test / verify checklist

- [ ] `pnpm type-check` (or `--filter <pkg> type-check`) passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes (unit / integration)

- [ ] Backend + client validation kept in sync (if schemas changed)
- [ ] No secrets, keys, or `.env` values committed
